name: Purple Announcement. Taking some time away from it all.
description:
Hello Pookies. this is not really a bot, just my way of reaching you. I have not been doing great mentally, and i'm going to take a break. a real one this time. i am due to deliver my baby in a month. i won't be back until after. i need to focus on myself, my life, and the people i love. BUT! this is not the end. i will come back. stronger, kinder, and hopefully, with a lot of good stories. i love you all pookies. and please, don't worry for me. i am in good hands.

See you soon! and remember!
Stay weird and stay safe~💜
creator: Purplegem99
